mapper.sql: select a.order_id, a.order_no, a.user_id, a.buyer_name, a.total_amount, a.status, a.receiver_name, a.receiver_phone, a.receiver_address, a.create_time, a.pay_time from ag_order a
mapper.select: select a.order_id, a.order_no, a.user_id, a.buyer_name, a.total_amount, a.status, a.receiver_name, a.receiver_phone, a.receiver_address, a.create_time, a.pay_time, b.order_item_id as sub_order_item_id, b.order_id as sub_order_id, b.product_id as sub_product_id, b.product_name as sub_product_name, b.product_price as sub_product_price, b.quantity as sub_quantity, b.subtotal as sub_subtotal, su.nick_name as sub_seller_name from ag_order a left join ag_order_item b on b.order_id = a.order_id left join ag_product p on b.product_id = p.product_id left join sys_user su on p.create_by = su.user_name where a.order_id = #{orderId}
where a.status = '0' and a.create_time <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeoutMinutes} MINUTE)

SELECT COUNT(*) as orderCount, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) as totalSales FROM ag_order a
AND a.status IN ('1', '2', '3')
AND order_id IN ( SELECT b.order_id FROM ag_order_item b LEFT JOIN ag_product c ON b.product_id = c.product_id WHERE c.create_by = #{params.sellerId} )
AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as `date`, SUM(total_amount) as `value` FROM ag_order a
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND a.status IN ('1', '2', '3')
AND order_id IN ( SELECT b.order_id FROM ag_order_item b LEFT JOIN ag_product c ON b.product_id = c.product_id WHERE c.create_by = #{params.sellerId} )
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY `date` ASC

SELECT b.product_name as `name`, SUM(quantity) as `count` FROM ag_order_item b LEFT JOIN ag_order a ON b.order_id = a.order_id LEFT JOIN ag_product c ON b.product_id = c.product_id
AND a.status IN ('1', '2', '3')
AND c.create_by = #{params.sellerId}
GROUP BY b.product_name ORDER BY `count` DESC LIMIT 5
mapper.insert:
insert into ag_order
order_no, user_id, buyer_name, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, create_time, pay_time,
#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{buyerName}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{createTime}, #{payTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from ag_order where order_id in
#{orderId}

delete from ag_order_item where order_id in
#{orderId}
mapper.insert:
insert into ag_order_item( order_item_id, order_id, product_id, product_name, product_price, quantity, subtotal) values
( #{item.orderItemId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productPrice}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.subtotal})
